data.name: 幼馴染とイチャラブえっち!! ～初々しかったあの子がド〇乱セッ〇ス中毒に～
data.detailed_description:
About

This is a sex simulation that moves smoothly with Live2D.

"I want a childhood friend."

"I want to be a girlfriend with a girl I grew up with."

"I want to have sex with my childhood friend as much as I want."

Please enjoy it while having these fantasies.

Story Mode

You can experience the state of your childhood friend in three stages.

*State 1 - Virgin

First time having sex with a childhood friend.

It hurts at first, but gradually you start to feel it...

*State 2 - Accustomed

She get the hang of it and come to enjoy it.

At this rate, She feel like She'll become dependent on you...

*State 3 - Lewd

She want it...She want it anyway. Her pussy is tingling and she can't stand it.

She feel so much while panting vulgarly...

Free Mode

You can have sex with a combination of different movements and facial expressions.

Camera

Three different camera angles can be switched at any time to suit your preference.

Zoom and position adjustment are also supported.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11 x64
  • 處理器: Core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: HD Graphics
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
